positive: A symmetrical, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain peak silhouette emerging from a vibrant sunset sky. The mountain features sharp, clean geometry and layered rock formations. Below the peak, incorporate stylized celestial elements like crescent moons, zodiac signs, and abstract constellations rendered in deep indigo and gold foil texture. The foreground should subtly suggest abstract floral or fractal patterns rooted in the base. Use a limited color palette of deep blues, burnt oranges, gold, and teal. Composition must be centrally focused, high contrast, vector-graphic aesthetic, minimal shading but maximum visual impact. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, designed to look clean and scalable.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealism, noisy, dirty, gradient wash
